# CLEAR Prompt Library — Operations

Use each prompt with CLEAR: Context, Limits, Examples, Action, Review.

## 1. SOP Builder

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Turn this messy process description into an SOP with purpose, inputs, steps, exceptions, owner, checklist, and escalation rules.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 2. Exception Report

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Analyze these operational notes and identify recurring exceptions, root causes, and process fixes. Separate urgent issues from improvement ideas.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 3. Process Automation Fit

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Score this workflow for AI automation fit using repetition, input clarity, output clarity, risk, review owner, and ROI. Recommend the safest first automation step.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```
